overrides.old: \( D = \{r \in P : \text{either } r \text{ is incompatible with } p, \text{ or } r \text{ is incompatible with } q, \text{ or } r \leq p \text{ and } r \leq q\} \text{ is dense.}]
overrides.new: D = \{r \in P : \text{either } r \text{ is incompatible with } p, \text{ or } r \text{ is incompatible with } q, \text{ or } r \leq p \text{ and } r \leq q\} \text{ is dense.}]
